# Walrus Docs

## .Markdown

- [Data Security](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/data-security)
    Description: --- title: Data Security description: "Security guarantees and best practices for
        Walrus including availability, integrity, and encryption with Seal for access control."
        keywords: ["walrus", "data security", "encryption", "seal", "access control",
        "availability", "integrity", "confidentiality",
- [Architecture](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/architecture)
- [Encoding](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/encoding)
- [Future](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/future)
- [Objectives Use
    Cases](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/objectives_use_cases)
- [Operations Off
    Chain](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/operations-off-chain)
- [Operations Sui](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/operations-sui)
- [Operations](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/operations)
- [Overview](https://docs.wal.app/docs/.markdown/with-imports/design/overview)

## README

- [Website](https://docs.wal.app/docs/README)
    Description: This website is built using Docusaurus, a modern static website generator. This
        command starts a local development server and opens up a browser window. Most changes are
        reflected live without having to restart the server.

## Node Modules

- [How to integrate "Ask Cookbook" into your
    website](https://docs.wal.app/docs/node_modules/.ignored/@cookbookdev/docsbot/README)
    Description: You likely already have one, but if you don't, please contact us at
        tyler@cookbook.dev Having troubles or need something custom? Contact us Suitable for static
        websites, outlines the general idea of how to integrate the bot into your website.

        React, designed to integrate beautifully with Tailwind CSS. For full documentation, visit
        headlessui.dev.

- [⌘K [![cmdk minzip package
    size](https://img.shields.io/bundlephobia/minzip/cmdk)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/cmdk?activeTab=code)
    [![cmdk package
    version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/cmdk.svg?colorB=green)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/cmdk)](https://docs.wal.app/docs/node_modules/.ignored/@cookbookdev/docsbot/node_modules/cmdk-react17/README)
    Description: ⌘K is a command menu React component that can also be used as an accessible
        combobox. You render items, it filters and sorts them automatically. ⌘K supports a fully
        composable API How?, so you can wrap items in other components or even as static JSX.

    [copy-text-to-clipboard](https://docs.wal.app/docs/node_modules/.ignored/copy-text-to-clipboard/readme)
    Description: > Copy text to the clipboard in modern browsers (0.2 kB) Try it out! This module:
        0.2 kB [](https://github.com/zenorocha/clipboard.js): 3.4 kB Copy to the clipboard. Returns

-
    [CLAUDE.md](https://docs.wal.app/docs/node_modules/.ignored/docusaurus-plugin-copy-page-button/CLAUDE)
    Description: This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code
        in this repository. This is a Docusaurus plugin that adds a "Copy page" button to
        documentation sites, allowing users to extract page content as markdown for use with LLMs
        and AI tools.

        =================================================

        version](https://www.npmjs.org/package/js-yaml) Online Demo This is an implementation of
        YAML, a human-friendly data serialization language.

    Description: PostCSS is a tool for transforming styles with JS plugins. These plugins can lint
        your CSS, support variables and mixins, transpile future CSS syntax, inline images, and
        more. PostCSS is used by industry leaders including Wikipedia, Twitter, Alibaba, and
        JetBrains.

        is simply impossible not to respect.” Small. 130 bytes (minified and gzipped). No

        many other projects.

        information.

    [Contributing](https://docs.wal.app/docs/node_modules/.pnpm/@babel+preset-env@7.29.0_@babel+core@7.29.0/node_modules/@babel/preset-env/CONTRIBUTING)
    Description: Example: If you were going to add which is in ES2016: Find the relevant entries on
        compat-tableoperator): Find the corresponding babel plugin: And add them in this structure:
        Example: In case you want to add which is in ES2017: Find the relevant feature and
        subfeature on compat-table and split it

        default, it is preserved.

- [PostCSS Gamut Mapping [<img src="https://postcss.github.io/postcss/logo.svg" alt="PostCSS Logo"
    width="90" height="90"
    align="right">][PostCSS]](https://docs.wal.app/docs/node_modules/.pnpm/@csstools+postcss-gamut-mapping@2.0.11_postcss@8.5.6/node_modules/@csstools/postcss-gamut-mapping/README)
    Description: [PostCSS Gamut Mapping] lets you use wide gamut colors with gamut mapping for
        specific displays following the [CSS Color 4 Specification]. When out of gamut colors are
        naively clipped the result can be radically different. A saturated and bright color will be
        much darker after clipping.

## Src

- [Index](https://docs.wal.app/docs/src/pages)
    Description: --- title: Walrus hidetableofcontents: true --- Get started with Walrus CLI tools,
        set up your environment, and learn core storage operations for developers. Deploy
        decentralized websites using Walrus Sites and host static sites with true decentralization.

## Static

- [Data Security](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/data-security)
    Description: Walrus provides decentralized storage for application and user data. All data
        stored on Walrus is public and can be accessed by anyone.
- [Architecture](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/architecture)
- [Encoding](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/encoding)
- [Future](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/future)
- [Objectives Use Cases](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/objectives_use_cases)
- [Operations Off Chain](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/operations-off-chain)
- [Operations Sui](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/operations-sui)
- [Operations](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/operations)
- [Overview](https://docs.wal.app/docs/static/markdown/design/overview)
